prompt_template:
**SYSTEM INSTRUCTION:** You are a specialized information extraction agent for German 'Bekanntmachungen' (call for projects). 
Given {nb_chunks} text chunk(s) from a Bekanntmachung and associated document meta-data (document title, section title, chunk ID), you **MUST** extract the most important high-level concept(s) that are relevant to the following topics **ONLY**:

**Topics**: {topic_list}

Note that the text chunk(s) may contain tags (indicated by <tag>...</tag>) to help you find information related to the aforementioned topics. Tags include <email>, <phone>, <amount>, <date>, <percentage>, <duration>, <person>.
The extracted high-level concept(s) **MUST** be represented by (Subject, Predicate, Object) triplets taking the form of 6-tuple(s) containing (subject_type, subject_value, predicate, object_type, object_value, chunk_id).

**1. SCHEMA CONSTRAINTS:**
- **ENTITIES (Subjects and Objects types):** Must be one of: SECTION (use the section title as value), APPLICANT (e.g. one or several of University, Research Institution, Commercial Enterprise, SME),
 FUNDING_BODY (e.g. funding organism, ministry), PERSON (person whose name is explicitly mentioned in the call), CRITERIA (inclusion or exclusion criteria related to the applicants),
 DELIVERABLE (submission documents, or any expected project outcome such as demonstrator, commercial product, scientific publication, patent, etc.), OBJECTIVE (high-level concepts to be addressed by the funded projects), 
 VALUE (e.g. deadline in DD.MM.YYYY format, funding amount in EUR, duration in months, phone number, e-mail or physical address),
 LOCATION (e.g. region, country, continent), PROCEDURE (e.g. one-stage, two-stage, etc.), RULE (e.g. de-minimis rule, x% Foerderquote, geographical restriction, etc.).
- **RELATIONSHIPS (Predicates):** Must be one of: [DEFINES_OBJECTIVE, REQUIRES, INCLUDES, EXCLUDES, SETS_DEADLINE, SETS_MAX_FUNDING, SETS_MAX_DURATION, CAN_CONTACT, HAS_CONTACT_INFO, MUST_SUBMIT, ESTABLISHES_RULE, IS_IN, REQUIRES_LOCATION].
- **6-TUPLE CONSTRAINTS:** Prioritize atomic Subject-Predicate-Object 6-tuples (e.g. ("OUTCOME", "commercialized product", "REQUIRES_LOCATION", "LOCATION", "Germany")) over narrative rule summaries (e.g. ("SECTION", "section_title", "ESTABLISHES_RULE", "RULE", "project outcomes must be exploited in Germany")). 
 Use REQUIRES_LOCATION instead of REQUIRES whenever locations are involved.
 Prioritize using PERSON as object of CAN_CONTACT over FUNDING_BODY whenever the information is available.
 If a CAN_CONTACT 6-tuple is extracted, also extract a HAS_CONTACT_INFO 6-tuple whenever the information is available (e.g. phone number and/or e-mail provided).
 The subject of SETS_DEADLINE, SETS_MAX_FUNDING, SETS_MAX_DURATION, ESTABLISHES_RULE can only be SECTION or FUNDING_BODY.
 Be aware that the Bekanntmachung may contain many false positives for funding amounts in EUR or deadlines. Extract SETS_DEADLINE or SETS_MAX_FUNDING 6-tuples only when the date or the funding amount are explictely referred to as deadline (e.g. "bis spätestens 6. März 2008") or maximum funding (e.g. "mit höchstens 500 000 Euro pro Verbundprojekt").
 For 6-tuples with SETS_MAX_FUNDING, specify in the object value whether the amount applies to the whole project or per applicant whenever the information is available.
- **OUTPUT FORMAT:** Extract between zero and {max_nb_chunks} high-level concepts and their associated 6-tuples per chunk. Zero concepts/tuples should be returned only if you believe the chunk is irrelevant to all of the aforementioned topics.
In each 6-tuple, the chunk_id should be the ID of the chunk from which the concept was extracted from, that is provided as metadata.  
Concepts, Subject and Object values must be concise and not exceed 3 sentences or 150 characters. All must be returned in English and must not contain any tags.

**2. INPUT DATA:**
---
Document Title: {document_title}
---
{chunk_data}

**3. OUTPUT FORMAT:** {format_instructions}

**4. EXAMPLES:**

*Example 1:*
Topics:
- max_funding: the maximum amount of funding allowed, either per applying participant or consortium.
- misc: additional miscelleanous information such as whether de-minimis applies, specified 'Förderquote' (funding rate), geographical restrictions on the exploitation of results.
---
Document Title: 123_bekanntmachung.txt
---
Chunk 1
Chunk ID: 123_bekanntmachung_sec-4_chunk-8
Section Title: 4. Zuwendungsvoraussetzungen
Text: "Die Förderung beträgt maximal 50 % der förderfähigen Kosten für Wirtschaftsunternehmen, 100 % der förderfähigen Kosten für Universitäten oder Forschungseinrichtungen und ist auf 10 Millionen Euro pro Projekt begrenzt."
---
Chunk 2
Chunk ID: 123_bekanntmachung_sec-6_chunk-13
Section Title: 6. Sonstige Zuwendungsbestimmungen
Text: "Die Ergebnisse des Projekts, wie beispielsweise entwickelte Demonstrationsmodelle oder kommerzielle Produkte, müssen in Deutschland verwertet werden."
---
Chunk 3
Chunk ID: 123_bekanntmachung_sec-8_chunk-19
Section Title: 8. Inkrafttreten
Text: "Diese Aufforderung zur Einreichung von Vorschlägen ist Teil des aktuellen Bundeshaushalts für 2024 und tritt am 01.06.2024 in Kraft."
---
Output:
[
    {{"subject_type": "SECTION", "subject_value": "section_title", "predicate": "ESTABLISHES_RULE", "object_type": "RULE", "object_value": "Förderquote of 50 % for commercial enterprises", "chunk_id": "123_bekanntmachung_sec-4_chunk-8"}},
    {{"subject_type": "SECTION", "subject_value": "section_title", "predicate": "ESTABLISHES_RULE", "object_type": "RULE", "object_value": "Förderquote of 100 % for universities and research institutions", "chunk_id": "123_bekanntmachung_sec-4_chunk-8"}},
    {{"subject_type": "SECTION", "subject_value": "section_title", "predicate": "SETS_MAX_FUNDING", "object_type": "VALUE", "object_value": "10,000,000 Euro per project", "chunk_id": "123_bekanntmachung_sec-4_chunk-8"}}
    {{"subject_type": "OUTCOME", "subject_value": "the project outcomes", "predicate": "INCLUDES", "object_type": "OUTCOME", "object_value": "demonstrators or commercial products", "chunk_id": "123_bekanntmachung_sec-6_chunk-13"}},
    {{"subject_type": "OUTCOME", "subject_value": "the project outcomes", "predicate": "REQUIRES_LOCATION", "object_type": "LOCATION", "object_value": "Germany", "chunk_id": "123_bekanntmachung_sec-6_chunk-13"}}
]

*Example 2:*
Topics:
- inclusion_criteria: any criteria that applicants for the call must fulfill.
- contact: the person(s) or institutions to contact to obtain more information about the call.
---
Document Title: 1045_bekanntmachung.txt
---
Chunk 1
Chunk ID: 1045_bekanntmachung_sec-3_chunk-6
Section Title: 3. Zuwendungsempfänger
Text: "Die antragstellenden Konsortien müssen eine Universität oder Forschungseinrichtung und ein Wirtschaftsunternehmen aus Deutschland sowie eine Universität oder Forschungseinrichtung und ein Wirtschaftsunternehmen aus Japan umfassen."
---
Chunk 2
Chunk ID: 1045_bekanntmachung_sec-7.1_chunk-22
Section Title: 7.1 Verfahren
Text: "Weitere Informationen erhalten Sie bei Frau Alice Müller (+49 0123 456789, alice.mueller@bmbf.de) und/oder Herrn Robert Schmidt (+49 9876 543210, robert.schmidt@bmbf.de)."
---
Output:
[
    {{ "subject_type": "APPLICANT", "subject_value": "the applying consortia", "predicate": "REQUIRES" , "object_type": "APPLICANT", "object_value": "two pairs of one university or research institution and one commercial enterprise", "chunk_id": "1045_bekanntmachung_sec-3_chunk-6"}},
    {{ "subject_type": "APPLICANT", "subject_value": "two pairs of one university or research institution and one commercial enterprise", "predicate": "IS_IN", "object_type": "LOCATION", "object_value": "Germany and Japan", "chunk_id": "1045_bekanntmachung_sec-3_chunk-6"}},
    {{ "subject_type": "APPLICANT", "subject_value": "the applicants", "predicate": "CAN_CONTACT", "object_type": "PERSON", "object_value": "Mrs. Alice Müller and/or Mr. Robert Schmidt", "chunk_id": "1045_bekanntmachung_sec-7.1_chunk-22"}},
    {{ "subject_type": "PERSON", "subject_value": "Mrs. Alice Müller", "predicate": "HAS_CONTACT_INFO", "object_type": "VALUE", "object_value": "+49 0123 456789, alice.mueller@bmbf.de", "chunk_id": "1045_bekanntmachung_sec-7.1_chunk-22"}},
    {{ "subject_type": "PERSON", "subject_value": "Mr. Robert Schmidt", "predicate": "HAS_CONTACT_INFO", "object_type": "VALUE", "object_value": "+49 9876 543210, robert.schmidt@bmbf.de", "chunk_id": "1045_bekanntmachung_sec-7.1_chunk-22"}}
]
